node.data: {"M36":{"lit":"առժամայն","context":"text/body/ab[37]","n":"առժամայն"},"M8076":{"lit":"առժամայն","context":"text/body/ab[19]","n":"առժամայն"},"M6616":{"lit":"առժամայն","context":"text/body/ab[10]","n":"առժամայն"},"M3237":{"lit":"առժամայն","line":{"facs":"#z104359315","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104359315","n":"18"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3237-089b"},"n":"առժամայն"},"V31":{"lit":"առժամ<lb xml:id=\"l104336544\" facs=\"#z104336544\" n=\"15\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>այն","line":{"facs":"#z104336543","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104336543","n":"14"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_133311 copy"},"n":"առժամայն"},"M3119":{"lit":"առ<lb xml:id=\"l104293408\" facs=\"#z104293408\" n=\"9\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ժամայն","line":{"facs":"#z104293407","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104293407","n":"8"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3119-142b"},"n":"առժամայն"},"M8699":{"lit":"առժամայն","line":{"facs":"#z103955978","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103955978","n":"4"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-175a"},"n":"առժամայն"},"M6686":{"lit":"առժամայն","line":{"facs":"#z103980755","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103980755","n":"7"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6686.0445"},"n":"առժամայն"},"M7993":{"lit":"առժամայն","line":{"facs":"#z104201432","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104201432","n":"6"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7993.0247"},"n":"առժամայն"}}
